briefdescription.para: Apache License 2.0.

detaileddescription.para: Check if the matrix/vector is defined (not NaN and not Inf)

simplesect.para: True if all elements are finite and not NaN

briefdescription.para: Check if any element of the matrix/vector is NaN.

simplesect.para: True if any element is NaN

briefdescription.para: Check if any element of the matrix/vector is infinite.

simplesect.para: True if any element is infinite

briefdescription.para: Check if the matrix/vector is near another within a tolerance.

parameterdescription.para: A numerical tolerance on the norm of the difference

simplesect.para: True if the norm of the difference is within the tolerance

briefdescription.para: Convert an integer scalar to a string.
Convert a double scalar to a string.

parameterdescription.para: A precision (number of decimal places, or -1 for automatic)

briefdescription.para: Convert the matrix/vector to a string representation.

parameterdescription.para: A precision (number of decimal places, or -1 for automatic)

briefdescription.para: Construct a unit vector along the X axis.
Construct a unit vector along the Y axis.
Construct a unit vector along the Z axis.
Construct an undefined fixed-size matrix/vector (all NaN)
Construct an undefined dynamic-size vector of given size (all NaN)
Construct an undefined dynamic-size matrix of given dimensions (all NaN)
Construct a fixed-size matrix/vector filled with NaN values.
Construct a dynamic-size vector filled with NaN values.
Construct a dynamic-size matrix filled with NaN values.
Construct a fixed-size matrix/vector filled with infinity values.
Construct a dynamic-size vector filled with infinity values.
Construct a dynamic-size matrix filled with infinity values.
Parse a string representation into a dynamic-size vector.

parameterdescription.para: A string in the format "[x, y, z, ...]"
